name: data_import
goal: 建立 RELION 项目目录，导入原始 movies 或 micrographs，并确认 pixel size、电压、Cs、文件路径和 STAR/metadata 信息正确。
inputs: 项目目录和原始数据目录
qc_checks: 导入后的文件数量与原始数据一致
STAR 文件中的路径可访问
pixel size 和 optics 信息与显微镜记录一致
项目目录结构清晰，后续 job 可复现
common_pitfalls: 从错误目录启动 RELION GUI，导致相对路径混乱
pixel size 写错，后续 CTF、重构尺度都会受影响
重复或不一致的 mdoc/STAR metadata 导致导入异常

导入时 pixel size 写错会影响什么？

name: motion_correction
goal: 校正 beam-induced motion 和帧间漂移，得到可用于 CTF 估计与颗粒挑选的 corrected micrographs。
inputs: dose/frame、pixel size、gain reference 等采集信息
relion_jobs: Movie compression / polishing related frame information
qc_checks: 校正后 micrograph 无明显拖影
运动轨迹合理，没有大面积异常漂移
输出文件和 STAR 路径完整
坏帧或异常电影被记录或排除
common_pitfalls: gain reference 或像素尺寸不匹配
dose 信息错误导致后续 dose weighting 或 polishing 受影响
异常 movies 混入后续流程
starter_questions: 运动校正后主要看哪些 QC 图？
motion correction 参数异常会影响 CTF 吗？
什么时候需要重新做运动校正？

source_refs.title: Movie Compression — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: RELION 4.0.1 and newer support MRC movies compressed by bzip2, xz or ZStandard in RELION’s own motion correction and Bayesian Polish for SPA.
Since the dose rate of counting mode movies is very low (otherwise, you will have coincidence losses), it is highly probable that the list contains an observation corresponding to one electron.

name: ctf_estimation
goal: 估计每张 micrograph 的 defocus、CTF 拟合质量等参数，为颗粒筛选、提取和后续精修提供基础。
inputs: 正确的 optics、pixel size、voltage 信息
qc_checks: Thon rings 清晰且拟合曲线合理
defocus 分布符合采集预期
剔除 CTF 拟合差或污染严重的 micrographs
低分辨和高分辨拟合范围设置合理
common_pitfalls: pixel size 或 voltage 错误导致 CTF 系统性错误
冰太厚、污染或漂移导致 Thon rings 不清晰
defocus 搜索范围过窄漏掉真实值

defocus 范围应该怎么设？

name: particle_picking
goal: 从 micrographs 中识别颗粒坐标，先用 LoG、template-free 或少量模板生成初始颗粒集，再逐步优化挑选质量。
inputs: 可选：少量人工检查或模板
qc_checks: 随机抽查 micrographs 上的 picks 是否落在真实颗粒中心
假阳性和漏检比例可接受
颗粒密度不过高也不过低
挑选结果能支撑后续 2D 分类
common_pitfalls: 阈值过松导致冰污染、碳边、噪声被大量挑入
阈值过严导致颗粒数量不足
颗粒直径估计不准影响 LoG 或 template picking

name: particle_extraction
goal: 根据颗粒坐标从 micrographs 中切出 particles，设置合适 box size，并生成后续 2D/3D 分类使用的 particle stack。

随机查看 particles 没有明显裁切或偏心
下采样后仍保留后续分类所需信息
common_pitfalls: box size 太小切掉颗粒信号
box size 太大增加噪声和计算负担
坐标缩放或导入坐标单位不一致

name: class_2d
goal: 通过 reference-free 2D class averaging 清理坏颗粒、污染和错误 picks，保留结构特征清晰的颗粒集合。
qc_checks: 好类显示清晰结构特征而非噪声
坏类或污染类被剔除
每个保留类颗粒数足够
不同视角覆盖合理
common_pitfalls: 类别数过少导致异质性混在一起
类别数过多导致每类颗粒不足

source_refs.title: Reference-free 2D class averaging — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: We almost always use reference-free 2D class averaging to throw away bad particles.
Because bad particles do not average well together, they often go to relatively small classes that yield ugly 2D class averages.

source_refs.title: Local-resolution estimation — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets:
Local-resolution estimation — RELION documentation
Local-resolution estimation
Local-resolution estimation
The estimated resolution from the post-processing program is a global estimate.
However, a single number cannot describe the variations in resolution that are often observed in reconstructions of macromolecular complexes.
Alp Kucukelbir and Hemant Tagare wrote a nifty program to estimate the variation in resolution throughout the map [ KST14 ] . relion implements a wrapper to this program t

source_refs.title: ModelAngelo: atomic modelling — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets:
ModelAngelo: atomic modelling — RELION documentation
ModelAngelo: atomic modelling
ModelAngelo: atomic modelling
As of release 5.0, relion comes with a machine-learning approach for automated atomic model building called ModelAngelo [ JKZ+24 ] . ModelAngelo is a graph neural network that combines information from the cryo-EM map with sequence information of the proteins that are present in the map to build an atomic model.
Because we know that the sample in this data set is beta-galactosidase fr

source_refs.title: De novo 3D model generation — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: Provided you have a reasonable distribution of viewing directions, and your data were good enough to yield detailed class averages in 2D classification , this algorithm is likely to yield a suitable, low-resolution model that can subsequently be used for 3D classification or 3D auto-refine .

source_refs.title: Wrapping up — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: For example, harsh cleaning will remove averaged micrographs from a MotionCorr job, or extracted particles stacks from a Particle extraction job, while gentle cleaning will remove all files from itermediate iterations of 2D classification , 3D classification or 3D auto-refine jobs.

name: ab_initio
goal: 从清理后的颗粒生成初始 3D 模型，为后续 3D 分类和精修提供参考。

source_refs.title: Introduction — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: This tutorial covers the entire single-particle analysis workflow in relion -5.0: beam-induced motion-correction, CTF estimation; automated particle picking; particle extraction; 2D class averaging; automated 2D class selection; VDAM-based initial model generation; 3D classification; high-resolution 3D refinement (including Blush regularisation); CTF refinement and higher-order aberration correction; Bayesian polishing to correct for beam-induced motions in the movies; map sharpening and local-resolution estimation; automated model building with ModelAngelo; and flexibility analysis with DynaM

source_refs.title: Extract subtomos — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: We will start by extracting pseudo-subtomograms in relatively large boxes with a large (binned) pixel size to speed up the initial calculations for obtaining a de novo initial model.

source_refs.title: High-resolution 3D refinement — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: This procedure employs the so-called gold-standard way to calculate Fourier Shell Correlation (FSC) from independently refined half-reconstructions in order to estimate resolution, so that self-enhancing overfitting may be avoided [ SC12 ] .

(We typically start auto-refinements from low-pass filtered maps to prevent bias towards high-frequency components in the map, and to maintain the gold-standard of completely independent refinements at resolutions higher than the initial one.)

source_refs.title: High-resolution 3D refinement — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: Finally, the procedure to sharpen a 3D reference map and estimate the gold-standard FSC curves for subtomogram averaging is the same as described in the SPA tutorial .
Next, we need to generate appropriate masks to help the refinement process and FSC assessment.

Tomo refinement 1: CTF refinement — RELION documentation
Tomo refinement 1: CTF refinement
Tomo refinement 1: CTF refinement
In this step we will show how to apply the refinement of the different parameters related to the CTF estimation such as tilt series projection defocus and contrast scale.
For a full description of the arguments, check the relion_tomo_refine_ctf program.
If you are running this job without following the tutorial, please note the requirements for the reference map and FSC da

source_refs.title: Introduction — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: This tutorial covers the entire single-particle analysis workflow in relion -5.0: beam-induced motion-correction, CTF estimation; automated particle picking; particle extraction; 2D class averaging; automated 2D class selection; VDAM-based initial model generation; 3D classification; high-resolution 3D refinement (including Blush regularisation); CTF refinement and higher-order aberration correction; Bayesian polishing to correct for beam-induced motions in the movies; map sharpening and local-resolution estimation; automated model building with ModelAngelo; and flexibility analysis with DynaM

source_refs.title: What’s new? — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: One of the major new features in relion -3.1 is a correction for higher-order aberrations in the data, i.e.
The signal to estimate these aberrations is calculated by averaging over particles from multiple micrographs.

source_refs.title: Bayesian polishing — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: Both Bayesian polishing and CTF refinement , which comprises per-particle defocus, magnification and higher-order aberration estimation, may improve the resolution of the reconstruction.
In this example, we first refined the aberrations, the magnification, and then the per-particle defocus values.

name: post_processing
goal: 创建合理 mask，执行 post-processing、sharpening、local resolution 或 Bayesian polishing 循环，形成可解释的最终 map。
qc_checks: mask 不切掉真实密度且不过度包含噪声
sharpen 后细节增强但噪声不过强
local resolution 与 map 视觉质量一致
polishing 或 CTF refinement 循环带来可重复改善
common_pitfalls: mask 过紧导致分辨率虚高
B-factor sharpening 过度放大噪声
把一次局部改善误判为全局质量提升
starter_questions: mask 应该怎么做才不虚高 FSC？
post-processing 后 map 太噪怎么办？
Bayesian polishing 什么时候值得做？

source_refs.title: Tomo refinement 2: Bayesian polishing — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: To assess the result, we generate new particles with the Extract subtomos job using the resulting optimisation_set.star file, followed by Reconstruct particle and Post-processing .

source_refs.title: Bayesian polishing — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: Note that this is not recommended when performing Bayesian polishing in relion .
Using this option, the solvent will be set to zero for all pixels outside the mask.

source_refs.title: Mask creation & Postprocessing — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets: relion ’s procedure for B-factor sharpening and calculating masked FSC curves [ CMF+13 ] is called post-processing .
In that case use a stronger low-pass filter and/or a wider and more softer mask in the Mask creation step above, and repeat the postprocessing.

source_refs.title: ModelAngelo: atomic modelling — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets:
ModelAngelo: atomic modelling — RELION documentation
ModelAngelo: atomic modelling
ModelAngelo: atomic modelling
As of release 5.0, relion comes with a machine-learning approach for automated atomic model building called ModelAngelo [ JKZ+24 ] . ModelAngelo is a graph neural network that combines information from the cryo-EM map with sequence information of the proteins that are present in the map to build an atomic model.
Because we know that the sample in this data set is beta-galactosidase fr

handedness 正确

common_pitfalls: handedness 错误导致模型无法合理拟合
低分辨区域过度建模

evidence_snippets:
De novo 3D model generation — RELION documentation
De novo 3D model generation
De novo 3D model generation
relion -4.0 uses a gradient-driven algorithm to generate a de novo 3D initial reference from the 2D particles.
As of release 4.0, this algorithm is different from the SGD algorithm in the CryoSPARC program [ PRFB17 ] .

source_refs.title: Wrapping up — RELION documentation
evidence_snippets:
Wrapping up — RELION documentation
Wrapping up
Wrapping up
Cleaning up your directories
Cleaning up your directories
In order to save disk space, relion has an option to clean up job directories.
There are two modes of cleaning: ‘gentle’ cleaning will only delete intermediate files from the job directory being cleaned; ‘harsh’ cleaning also deletes files that may be necessary to launch a new job that needs input from the job being cleaned.
